description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a ribbed, split lid made of heavy-duty plastic or metal, designed for outdoor waste collection. The body is robust and industrial, featuring reinforced side panels and a dark blue-black color scheme. The lid is hinged at the back and has a horizontal bar across the front, likely for opening or securing the lid. The sides are plain, with no visible handles or wheels, and the front and rear panels are solid and unadorned. The overall construction suggests durability and resistance to weather, suitable for high-traffic urban environments. There are no visible warning labels, signage, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A large, industrial metal dumpster with a ribbed, split lid and reinforced panels, finished in dark blue-black. Designed for outdoor waste collection, it features a sturdy, utilitarian build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ribbed, split lid with a horizontal bar and solid, reinforced front panel.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the plain side panel and the thickness of the lid, with no visible handles or wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the full width of the split lid and the reinforced back panel, with the lid's hinge mechanism visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the plain side and the lid's overhang.
attribute_lid_type: split, ribbed, hinged lid made of plastic or metal, two sections, with a horizontal bar for opening; no visible locking mechanism
attribute_handle_design: horizontal bar handle on the front lid section; no side or rear handles visible
